chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Providing Water

text: 1722 - قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَوَّلُ مَا يُبْدَأُ بِهِ فِي اَلْآخِرَةِ صَدَقَةُ اَلْمَاءِ يَعْنِي فِي اَلْأَجْرِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1722 - Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"The first thing to be rewarded in the Hereafter is the charity of providing water."
